name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages

TypeOK ==
  /\ participants \in [1..N -> {"Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}]
  /\ coordinator \in {"Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}
  /\ messages \in Seq([sender -> 1..N)

Init ==
  /\ participants = [i \in 1..N |-> "Init"]
  /\ coordinator = "Init"
  /\ messages = <<>>

Prepare ==
  /\ coordinator = "Init"
  /\ coordinator' = "Prepared"
  /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender -> 0, receiver -> 1..N, type -> "Prepare"])

VoteYes ==
  /\ \A i \in 1..N : participants[i] = "Prepared"
  /\ \A i \in 1..N : messages[i] = [sender -> 0, receiver -> i, type -> "VoteYes"]
  /\ coordinator' = "Committed"
  /\ messages' = <<>>

VoteNo ==
  /\ \E i \in 1..N : participants[i] = "Prepared"
  /\ \E i \in 1..N : messages[i] = [sender -> 0, receiver -> i, type -> "VoteNo"]
  /\ coordinator' = "Aborted"
  /\ messages' = <<>>

Commit ==
  /\ coordinator = "Committed"
  /\ \A i \in 1..N : participants[i] = "Committed"
  /\ messages' = <<>>

Abort ==
  /\ coordinator = "Aborted"
  /\ \A i \in 1..N : participants[i] = "Aborted"
  /\ messages' = <<>>

Next ==
  \/ Prepare
  \/ VoteYes
  \/ VoteNo
  \/ Commit
  \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Helper function to get the right fork index *)
Right(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* Initial state: all forks are free, all philosophers are thinking *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ states[i] = "hungry"
          /\ forks[i] = FALSE
          /\ forks[Right(i)] = FALSE
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE, ![Right(i)] = TRUE]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ states[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE, ![Right(i)] = FALSE]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ states[i] = "thinking"
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
          /\ forks' = forks

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag



Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({num[j] : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
          /\ \E j \in 1..N :
                flag[j] /\ (num[j] < num[i] \/ (num[j] = num[i] /\ j < i))
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<num>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
    /\ head \in 1..K
    /\ tail \in 1..K
    /\ size \in 0..K

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
    /\ q = <<>>
    /\ head = 1
    /\ tail = 1
    /\ size = 0

(* Producer action: blocks when full *)
Producer == 
    /\ size < K
    /\ q' = Append(q, 1)  (* Enqueue a dummy value *)
    /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
    /\ size' = size + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED head

(* Consumer action: blocks when empty *)
Consumer == 
    /\ size > 0
    /\ q' = Tail(q)  (* Dequeue *)
    /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
    /\ size' = size - 1
    /\ UNCHANGED tail

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == Producer \/ Consumer

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Server

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in Nat
          /\ votedFor \in {None} \/ [x \in Server |-> x]
          /\ state \in {Follower, Candidate, Leader}

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = None
        /\ state = Follower

CandidateVote == /\ state = Candidate
                /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
                /\ votedFor' = self
                /\ state' = Candidate

FollowerVote == /\ state = Follower
               /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
               /\ votedFor' = self
               /\ state' = Follower

LeaderVote == /\ state = Leader
             /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
             /\ votedFor' = self
             /\ state' = Leader

Next == CandidateVote \/ FollowerVote \/ LeaderVote

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>
